statement: The absorption rate is valid under market conditions characterized by moderate to high volume expansion and volatility, but breaks down when volume contraction or low volatility co-occurs with momentum-driven regimes.

revision_history.updated_statement: The absorption rate is valid when the market is in a range-bound regime with moderate to high volatility and sufficient volume participation, but breaks down when the market transitions out of this regime without corresponding participation or when volatility increases without strengthening short-term momentum.

The absorption rate is valid under conditions of moderate to high volume expansion and volatility, but breaks down when either participation or volatility is weak. It is also valid in range-bound regimes with moderate to high volatility and sufficient volume participation, but breaks down when the market transitions out of this regime without corresponding participation or when volatility increases without strengthening short-term momentum.

The absorption rate is valid under market conditions characterized by moderate to high volume expansion and volatility, with a potential shift towards range-bound or trend persistence. It breaks down when volume expansion is weak or absent, or when the market transitions out of these regimes without corresponding participation or strengthening short-term momentum.

The absorption rate is valid under market conditions characterized by moderate to high volume expansion and volatility, with a potential shift towards range-bound or trend persistence. It breaks down when participation is weak or volatility is compressed.

It breaks down when participation is weak or volatility is compressed, but remains stable in scenarios where participation is strong and short-term momentum is present.
